notableEvents.label: Maikel Garcia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Maikel Garcia grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Kyle Isbel out at 2nd. Maikel Garcia out at 1st.
